scripts.build: if [ "$RENDER_SERVICE_NAME" = "arrena-photo-backend" ]; then pnpm run db:generate && pnpm --filter @arrena-photo/backend-api run build; elif [ "$RENDER_SERVICE_NAME" = "arrena-photo-frontend" ]; then cd apps/frontend && npm run build; else pnpm --recursive run build; fi
scripts.start: if [ "$RENDER_SERVICE_NAME" = "arrena-photo-backend" ]; then pnpm run db:push && cd apps/backend-api && pnpm run start:prod; elif [ "$RENDER_SERVICE_NAME" = "arrena-photo-frontend" ]; then cd apps/frontend && npm start; else pnpm --parallel --recursive run start; fi
